name: Small Transportable Storage Black - Brightroom™: Car & Trunk Organizer, Automotive Accessories, Polyester, 16"x10"x8"
description:
Easily organize toys, books, magazines, clothing and more with this Small Transportable Storage from Brightroom™. The black transportable storage bag with double open storage and mesh pockets helps keep a wide variety of accessories contained and your living space clutter free. It boasts a foldable design for convenient, space-saving storage when not in use, while long built-in handles on the sides allow for easy carrying.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
